description: superboom plugin hooks — copy relevant sections to your project's .claude/settings.local.json

Stop.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOKENS=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); u=d.get(\"usage\",{}); print(u.get(\"input_tokens\",0)+u.get(\"output_tokens\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "━━━ superboom | tokens used: $TOKENS / 200,000 ━━━"'
Stop.description: Show token usage summary on every stop

Stop.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOKENS=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); u=d.get(\"usage\",{}); print(u.get(\"input_tokens\",0)+u.get(\"output_tokens\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$TOKENS" -gt 120000 ] 2>/dev/null && osascript -e "display notification \"Token: $TOKENS/200k — run /compact\" with title \"superboom Token Alert\"" 2>/dev/null; true'
Stop.description: macOS notification when token usage exceeds 60% (120,000 tokens)

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); i=d.get(\"tool_input\",{}); print(i.get(\"file_path\",i.get(\"path\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\\.py$"; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format TypeScript/JavaScript (Prettier) and Python (Black) after Write/Edit

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'LOG_DIR="$HOME/.claude/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_name\",\"unknown\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); echo "[$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)] tool=$TOOL" >> "$LOG_DIR/superboom-session-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log"'

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); PATTERNS=("rm -rf /" "git push --force origin main" "git push --force origin master" "git push -f origin main" "git push -f origin master" "DROP TABLE" "DROP DATABASE" "format c:" "dd if=" "mkfs"); for p in "${PATTERNS[@]}"; do if echo "$CMD" | grep -qi "$p"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"superboom safety: blocked dangerous pattern: $p\"}"; exit 0; fi; done'
PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous bash patterns before execution

SubagentStop.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"agent_name\",\"unknown\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); TOKENS=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); u=d.get(\"usage\",{}); print(u.get(\"input_tokens\",0)+u.get(\"output_tokens\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "[superboom] subagent $NAME stopped | tokens: $TOKENS"'
SubagentStop.description: Log subagent name and token cost when each subagent finishes
